executive_summary: Today's top VC sourcing signals for 2026-04-28 indicate a strong presence of stealth mode founders across India and Southeast Asia, with a slight lean towards India. The strongest archetypes emerging are those with a background in AI Agents, Fintech, and TravelTech, aligning with current hot sectors. Notable leads include Dave Ng, who is going stealth in Singapore, and Pranav Sharma, who is exploring opportunities in TravelTech in India, both of whom demonstrate potential for further investigation. With a total of 11 signals above threshold, these leads warrant closer examination to uncover potential investment opportunities.

persons.name: Dave Ng
persons.investment_thesis: Dave Ng has departed from Altara, suggesting a potential new venture. While the exact nature of his next move is unclear, his exit from a known entity in Singapore warrants a closer look, especially if he has significant prior experience. We need to uncover more about his background and the focus of his new endeavor.

signals.description: [e27] “The risk doesn’t go away; execution decides everything”: Altara’s Dave Ng

key_strengths: Executive departure from a known entity (Altara)
Implied focus on execution and risk management
risks: Second-time founder status is explicitly false
No clear signal of a new company registration or stealth mode

Further investigation into his prior experience and the traction of Kōan is warranted.
